topics.title: Accounting Concepts and Double Entry
examination_focus: Accounting concepts: business entity, going concern, accrual
Dual aspect and double entry principles
Errors: types, suspense account and correction

topics.title: Books of Original Entry
examination_focus: Sales, purchases and returns day books
Cash book: single, double and three column
Petty cash book and imprest system

topics.title: Final Accounts of Sole Trader
examination_focus: Bad debts and provision for doubtful debts
topics.typical_question_style: prepare final accounts with year-end adjustments

topics.title: Partnership and Company Accounts
examination_focus: Partnership: capital, current accounts, profit sharing

topics.title: Accounting Ratios and Interpretation
examination_focus: Profitability ratios (gross margin, net margin, ROCE)

topics.title: Funds Flow, Cash Flow and Incomplete Records
examination_focus: Cash flow statement: operating, investing, financing
Single entry to double entry conversion
topics.typical_question_style: prepare cash flow statement from financial data

topics.title: Manufacturing Account
topics.typical_question_style: prepare manufacturing account from given data

topics.title: Not-for-Profit and Control Accounts
examination_focus: Control accounts: sales and purchases ledger
topics.typical_question_style: prepare income and expenditure account from receipts and payments
